# Enable GitHub Discussions

Go to: https://github.com/gmoskovicz/edot-autopilot/settings
→ Features → check "Discussions" → Save

Then create these starter categories:
- 💡 Show and Tell — "Share how you used EDOT Autopilot"
- ❓ Q&A — "Ask questions about instrumentation"
- 🌍 Language Requests — "Request a new Tier D language snippet"

Pin a welcome discussion:
Title: "Welcome — what language or runtime brought you here?"
This surfaces in GitHub search and signals active community to new visitors.
